args.Description: "Declare selectedCompany helper at the top of CompanyDashboard component"
args.ReplacementContent: "  const [selectedCompanyId, setSelectedCompanyId] = useState('1');\n  const selectedCompany = companies.find(c => c.id === selectedCompanyId) || companies[0] || { nomeFantasia: 'Colaborh', razaoSocial: 'Colaborh Soluções LTDA' };"
